allow: Bash(./venv/Scripts/pip install PyQt6==6.7.1 matplotlib==3.9.2 bcrypt==4.2.0 cryptography==43.0.3 openpyxl==3.1.5 Pillow==10.4.0)

Bash(cmd /c "venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c ""import bcrypt; print\(bcrypt.__file__\); from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.aead import AESGCM; print\(''AESGCM ok''\); from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes; print\(''hashes ok''\)""")
Bash(cmd /c "cd /d C:\\Arun\\Financial_App && dir dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal /B 2>&1 | findstr /i ""bcrypt crypt cffi""")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; if \(Test-Path ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal''\) { Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' | Where-Object { $_Name -match ''bcrypt|crypt|cffi'' } | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Host ''No dist folder'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' -Filter ''*bcrypt*'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' -Filter ''*crypt*'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' -Filter ''*cffi*'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; & venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c ''import cryptography; print\(cryptography.__version__\); from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.aead import AESGCM; print\(""AESGCM: ok""\); from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes; print\(""hashes: ok""\); from cryptography.hazmat.bindings._rust import openssl; print\(""rust ok""\)'' 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; if \(Test-Path ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal\\bcrypt''\) { Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal\\bcrypt'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { ''no bcrypt folder'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; if \(Test-Path ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal\\cryptography''\) { Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal\\cryptography'' -Recurse | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Select-Object -First 30 } else { ''no cryptography folder'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' -Filter ''*ssl*'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' -Filter ''*libssl*'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' -Filter ''*.dll'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal'' -Filter ''cryptography'' | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem ''dist\\FinancialTracker\\_internal\\cryptography'' -Recurse | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\pyinstaller.exe FinancialTracker.spec --noconfirm *> build_log.txt; Write-Host ''Build exit code:'' $LASTEXITCODE")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; if \(Test-Path ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip''\) { Remove-Item ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip'' }; Compress-Archive -Path ''dist\\FinancialTracker'' -DestinationPath ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip'' -Force; Write-Host ''ZIP size:'' \([math]::Round\(\(Get-Item ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip''\).Length / 1MB, 1\)\) ''MB''")

Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Test-Path ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App\\data\\financial_app.db''\) { Remove-Item ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App\\data\\financial_app.db''; Write-Host ''DB cleared'' } else { Write-Host ''No DB found \(already clean\)'' }; if \(Test-Path ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App\\dist\\FinancialTracker\\data''\) { Remove-Item ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App\\dist\\FinancialTracker\\data'' -Recurse; Write-Host ''dist data cleared'' } else { Write-Host ''dist has no data folder \(correct\)'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; & .\\venv\\Scripts\\pyinstaller.exe FinancialTracker.spec --noconfirm *> build_log.txt; Write-Host ''Exit:'' $LASTEXITCODE; Get-Content build_log.txt | Select-Object -Last 10")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Arun\\Financial_App''; if \(Test-Path ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip''\) { Remove-Item ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip'' }; Compress-Archive -Path ''dist\\FinancialTracker'' -DestinationPath ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip'' -Force; Write-Host ''ZIP ready:'' \([math]::Round\(\(Get-Item ''FinancialTracker_Portable.zip''\).Length / 1MB, 1\)\) ''MB''; if \(Test-Path ''data\\financial_app.db''\) { Remove-Item ''data\\financial_app.db''; Write-Host ''Dev DB cleared'' }")

Bash("venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import py_compile, sys; files=[''app/core/database.py'',''app/core/constants.py'',''app/models/debt.py'',''app/models/networth.py'',''app/services/networth_service.py'',''app/ui/debt/ppf_widget.py'',''app/ui/debt/nps_widget.py'',''app/ui/main_window.py'']; ok=True; [print\(f''  OK  {f}''\) or True if not \(lambda e: \(print\(f''  FAIL {f}: {e}''\), False\)\)\(None\) else False for f in files]; [py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\) and print\(f''OK {f}''\) for f in files]")
